name: google_news_scraper
title: Google News Scraper
description: Search Google News RSS and return normalized article titles, sources, RSS links, GUIDs, publication timestamps, and source URLs when available.

seo.title: Google News Scraper Tool for Article Metadata
seo.description: Search Google News RSS with Better Fetch and return normalized titles, sources, RSS links, GUIDs, source URLs, and publication timestamps.
seo.intro: Google News Scraper gives agents a lightweight way to monitor current news coverage for a keyword. The tool queries Google News RSS, parses the feed, and returns clean article records with title, source, source URL, RSS link, GUID, and publication timestamp fields suitable for monitoring, research, and downstream article extraction.

useCases.title: News monitoring
useCases.description: Track coverage for a company, person, product, ticker, policy issue, or competitor and return fresh article metadata in a compact JSON shape.

useCases.title: Research queues
useCases.description: Collect candidate article URLs before sending selected stories through Extract Article or another deeper page-content tool.

useCases.title: Agent briefings
useCases.description: Give an agent recent headlines, sources, and timestamps so it can spot themes before deciding which articles deserve closer review.

faqs.question: Does Google News Scraper extract full article text?
faqs.answer: No. Version 0.1 returns Google News RSS metadata. Use Extract Article on selected links when you need publisher-page text.

faqs.question: Can I choose country and language?
faqs.answer: Yes. The tool supports Google News language, country, and ceid parameters for localized RSS results.

faqs.question: Does it require a Google API key?
faqs.answer: No. The tool reads the public Google News RSS feed through Better Fetch and does not use account-specific Google credentials.

query.description: Google News search query. Supports normal Google search operators.

language.description: Google News hl parameter, such as en-US or de-DE.

country.description: Google News gl parameter, such as US, AU, GB, or DE.
